spec.description: Prometheus metrics for vLLM inference: latency, throughput, scheduler state, and KV-cache utilization.

spec.title: ITL Latency
spec.description: Inter-token latency during decode: P50, P90, P95, P99, and mean (vllm:inter_token_latency_seconds).

spec.title: Request Finish Reasons
spec.description: Completed requests by finish reason, such as EOS or max sequence length (vllm:request_success_total).

spec.title: Prompt Length Distribution
spec.description: Heatmap of input prompt token counts per request (vllm:request_prompt_tokens_bucket).

spec.title: Generation Length Distribution
spec.description: Heatmap of output token counts per request (vllm:request_generation_tokens_bucket).

spec.title: Request Queue Time
spec.description: Time requests spend waiting in the scheduler queue before execution (vllm:request_queue_time_seconds).

spec.title: Prefill and Decode Time
spec.description: Aggregate time spent in prefill and decode phases (vllm:request_prefill_time_seconds, vllm:request_decode_time_seconds).

spec.title: Max Generation Tokens
spec.description: Maximum generation tokens reserved per sequence group (vllm:request_max_num_generation_tokens).

spec.title: Scheduler State
spec.description: Count of requests in running, waiting, and swapped scheduler states (vllm:num_requests_*).

spec.title: KV Cache Utilization
spec.description: Share of KV-cache blocks in use, 0–1 scale (vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc).

spec.title: TTFT Latency
spec.description: Time to first output token: P50, P90, P95, P99, and mean (vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds).

spec.title: Token Throughput
spec.description: Prompt and generation token processing rates per second (vllm:prompt_tokens_total, vllm:generation_tokens_total).

spec.title: E2E Request Latency
spec.description: End-to-end request latency: P50, P90, P95, P99, and mean (vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds).

spec.title: Active Models
spec.description: KV-cache use and in-flight requests per model/engine over time (vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc, vllm:num_requests_running).

spec.title: AMD vLLM Inference Dashboard

spec.name: instance
spec.label: vLLM Instance
spec.description: Prometheus instance label on vLLM exporter scrape targets (host:port from job vllm-exporter; localhost excluded).

spec.name: model
spec.label: LLM Model
spec.description: Model name on the selected vLLM instance (from vllm:kv_cache_usage_perc).
